title: Forgotten City V2
description: This mod pack was made for exploration and tech
body:
⚙️ Build. Automate. Explore. 🌍

This modpack blends deep mechanical engineering, advanced computing, and vast exploration into one seamless experience. Powered by the Create mod, you’ll design intricate machines with gears, belts, and kinetic systems that feel alive and hands-on. Pair that with ComputerCraft, and suddenly your factories can think—automate, control, and optimize everything using real programmable computers.

Beyond Create and ComputerCraft, the pack expands into modern tech progression, offering power generation, automation chains, logistics, and quality-of-life systems that reward clever design and long-term planning.

When you’re ready to step away from the factory floor, a massive exploration overhaul awaits. Discover new biomes, structures, dimensions, and hidden secrets scattered across the world. Whether you’re delving into ruins, traveling to distant lands, or uncovering rare resources, there’s always something new beyond the horizon.

🔧 Perfect for players who love:

Mechanical automation and factory design

Programmable logic and smart systems

Tech progression without losing creativity

Large, rewarding exploration and adventure

Whether you’re an engineer, programmer, explorer—or all three—this modpack gives you the tools to build a world that truly runs on your ideas.
